evals.prompt: Create the Zod schema for the article Content Collection including all frontmatter fields. Show the complete src/content/config.ts file.
evals.expected_output: Complete Zod schema with all required fields: url, category, priority, question, seoTitle, metaDescription, paaAnswer, contextSections, impulseSection, faqItems, internalLinkRefs, breadcrumbs, publishedDate, modifiedDate, readTime, articleImages

assertions.text: Uses z.object() from astro:content for the schema definition
contextSections is z.array of objects with heading and content fields
faqItems is z.array of objects with question and answer keys (not q/a)
articleImages uses z.array with min(3) constraint
articleImages items have placement as z.enum(['hero', 'inline'])
impulseSection includes heading, content, and ctaLinks array
priority uses z.enum(['High', 'Medium'])
Exports collections object with articles key
FAQItem type is referenced as coming from utils/schemaData.ts (never locally defined)
No banned AI words used (delve, tapestry, realm, leverage, etc.)

evals.prompt: A new article category 'Business English' needs to be added with its own CTA links, internal links, breadcrumb hub, and image selection. Walk through all the files that need to change.
evals.expected_output: Step-by-step guide covering: types.ts ArticleCategory union, category-config.ts entry, auto-publish.js CATEGORY_RULES regex, CTA links, internal links, breadcrumb hub, and image mapping

assertions.text: Mentions updating ArticleCategory type in data/articles/types.ts
Mentions adding entry to data/category-config.ts
Mentions adding regex pattern to CATEGORY_RULES in auto-publish.js
Specifies CTA links array with text and href for the new category
Mentions internal links mapping for the new category
Mentions breadcrumb hub configuration with label and href
Mentions image category mapping (CATEGORY_IMAGE_MAP)
Lists at least 4 files that need changes
Output follows a sequential workflow (not random order)
No placeholder text remains (TODO, REPLACE, TBD)
